name: Desert Eagle | Serpent Strike
description: The Desert Eagle | Serpent Strike is a popular Classified-grade pistol skin in CS2, released on April 1, 2025, in the Fever Case. It features a vibrant custom-painted orange and red snakeskin pattern across the slide and grip, often with a predatory eye design, described by the text
on the slide. The skin is highly sought after for its striking design and rarity, making it a prized item among CS2 collectors and players.
